### Projects
- Active projects live in projects/<name>/. Read the project folder before starting work on it.

### Portfolio & Assets
- Finished pieces are indexed in portfolio/Portfolio.md; their images, PDFs, and video live in assets/.
- Pull a project from projects/ into portfolio/ only once it is done.
